== Notes for [[Item:Q116588|Q116588]] ==

Fredelon, Freddon, or Fredol (died 852) was the first Count of Toulouse (844 – 852) of the dynasty of Rouergue.

Son of Fulcoald of Rouergue and Senegund, daughter of Alda, sister of William of Gellone, Fredeon was related to the families of the counts of Rouergue and Toulouse.

In 840, Fulcoald died, but Fredelon was not confirmed as his successor in Rouergue. But when Bernard of Septimania was captured by Charles the Bald for rebellion against his lord and executed in 844, the king bestowed his county of Toulouse on Fredelon. Pepin II of Aquitaine, who was leading the revolt against Charles, appointed Bernard's heir William to the county of Toulouse. Of the two claimants to Toulouse, William had the upper hand. In 849, however, William was in Barcelona and Charles invaded Aquitaine. Fredelon, then in control of Toulouse, taking advantage of William's absence, opened the gates of the city to his sovereign and was reconfirmed in his possession of it.

Fredelon received the County of Carcassonne in 850 and died in 852, leaving his titles to his brother Raymond. By his wife Oda, he left one daughter named Udalgarda who married Bernard Plantapilosa.

http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fredelon_of_Toulouse

--------------------

FREDELON ([815]-[849/52]). His parentage is confirmed by the charter dated 3 Nov 862 under which "Raymundus…comes et marchio et uxor mea Berteyz" founded the abbey of Vabres for the souls of "genitoris nostri Fulgualdi et…genetrice mea Senegundi et…germano meo Fredolone quondam"[188]. He took part in the recapture of Toulouse by Charles II "le Chauve" King of the West Franks from Pepin II King of Aquitaine in 845. The king appointed Fredelon as Governor of Toulouse [850]-[852] and he used the title “Custos Civitatis” of Toulouse. m ---. The name of Fredelon's wife is not known. Fredelon & his wife had [one possible child]:

a) [FULCRADE ([840]-after 878). Settipani suggests that she may have been the daughter of Fredelon, and also speculates on her possible descendants[189]. He bases this on the charter dated Mar 924 under which "Senegundis" donated property to Conques for the souls of "filio meo Fredolone et…genitori meo Warmario et genetrice mea Folcradanæ…viro meo Amblardo sive Jorio et…filiorum meorum Stephano, Bernardo, Adalgario sive Jorio"[190]. m GARNIER, son of RAINAUD & his wife ---.]

http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/TOULOUSE.htm

Stewart Roderick, W.
Royalty For Commoners, 3rd Edition, Publisher Genealogical Publishing Co. Inc.
Baltimore, MD 1998
ISBN-0-8063-1561-X
Pg 329-40

Name Prefix:<NPFX> Count

Name Prefix:<NPFX> Count

Rootsweb Feldman
URL: http://worldconnect.genealogy.rootsweb.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=:3044567&id=I23260
# ID: I23260
# Name: Fredelon Of AUTUN 1 2 3 4 5
# Sex: M
# Birth: 750 in Rouergue, Toulouse, France 1 2 3 4 5
# Change Date: 15 JAN 2004 5
# Change Date: 23 OCT 2001 2 3 4 5
# Note:

[Joanne's Tree.1 GED.GED]

2 SOUR S332582
3 DATA
4 TEXT Date of Import: 14 Jan 2004


[daveanthes.FTW]

TYPE Book
AUTH Stuart, Roderick W.
PERI Royalty for Commoners
EDTN 3d
PUBL Genealogical Publishing co., Inc, Baltimore, MD (1998)
ISB 0-8063-1561-X
TEXT (329-40)
DATE 31 MAY 2000

OCCU Count of Rouergue ...
SOUR al7fl.abts.net/green-page/greenged.html
Count of Toulouse - COMYNI.GED (Compuserve), #1395; Count of Toulouse about
849- al7fl.abts.net/green-page/greenged.html;

GIVN Fredelon
STAT LIVE
TITL Royalty for Commoners: The Complete Known Lineage of John of Gaunt, Son of Edward III, King of England, and Queen Philip
AUTH Roderick W. Stuart
PUBL 3rd ed., 1998, Genealogical Publishing Co., Inc., Baltimore, MD
ABBR Royalty for Commoners
DATE 17 JAN 2000
TIME 18:16:50[Spare.FTW]

Father: Fulcoald DE ROUERGUE b: ABT 750 in Rouergue, France

Marriage 1 Bertha DE AUTUN b: 760 in France

* Married: ABT 799 in France 1 2 3 4 5

Children

1. Has Children Senegonde DE ROUERGUE b: ABT 785 in Toulouse, France


Sources:

1. Title: daveanthes.FTW
Note: ABBR daveanthes.FTW
Note: Source Media Type: Other
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Book
Text: Date of Import: 14 Jan 2004
2. Title: daveanthes.FTW
Note: ABBR daveanthes.FTW
Note: Source Media Type: Other
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Book
Text: Date of Import: Jan 13, 2004
3. Title: Spare.FTW
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: Jan 18, 2004
4. Title: Spare.FTW
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: 21 Jan 2004
5. Title: Joanne's Tree.1 GED.GED
Repository:
Call Number:
Media: Other
Text: Date of Import: Feb 6, 2004

==========================================

[Geoffrey De Normandie, Gedcom BSJTK Smith Family Tree.ged]

TYPE Book
AUTH Stuart, Roderick W.
PERI Royalty for Commoners
EDTN 3d
PUBL Genealogical Publishing co., Inc, Baltimore, MD (1998)
ISB 0-8063-1561-X
TEXT (329-40)
DATE 31 MAY 2000

OCCU Count of Rouergue ...
SOUR al7fl.abts.net/green-page/greenged.html
Count of Toulouse - COMYNI.GED (Compuserve), #1395; Count of Toulouse about
849- al7fl.abts.net/green-page/greenged.html;

OCCU Count of Rouergue ...
SOUR al7fl.abts.net/green-page/greenged.html
Count of Toulouse - COMYNI.GED (Compuserve), #1395; Count of Toulouse about
849- al7fl.abts.net/green-page/greenged.html;

GIVN Fredelon
STAT LIVE
TITL Royalty for Commoners: The Complete Known Lineage of John of Gaunt, Son of Edward III, King of England, and Queen Philip
AUTH Roderick W. Stuart
PUBL 3rd ed., 1998, Genealogical Publishing Co., Inc., Baltimore, MD
ABBR Royalty for Commoners
DATE 17 JAN 2000
TIME 18:16:50

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
